/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/vendor/wasi-sdk/bin/clang++ --target=wasm32-wasi --sysroot=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/sysroot -fPIC -I/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/include -D_WASI_EMULATED_PTHREAD -D_WASI_EMULATED_MMAN -D_WASI_EMULATED_SIGNAL -D_WASI_EMULATED_PROCESS_CLOCKS -DDUCKDB_DISABLE_EXTENSION_LOAD -DSQLITE_NOHAVE_SYSTEM -DSQLITE_OMIT_POPEN -fwasm-exceptions -DWEBDB_FAST_EXCEPTIONS=1 -isystem /home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/sysroot/include/wasm32-wasi/c++/v1 -DDUCKDB_SMALLER_BINARY -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -DNDEBUG   -L/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/llvm-runtimes-install/lib -fwasm-exceptions -shared  -o libduckdb.so
